'''Hirshoot''' was the personal servant of [[Orko]] the [[H'uun]]; secretly doing undercover work for [[Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo/Legends|Gorga the Hutt]] while under Orko's service. Because of his "miserly salary", he took up Gorga's offer to kill Orko, eagerly. He tried to kill Orko numerous times and failed. Hirshoot was ripped apart by [[Ry-Kooda]] when the [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] killed Orko.

==Behind the scenes==
Hirsoot appears to be Human, but with pointy ears. [[Leland Chee]], on the [[StarWars.com Message Boards]], stated that his theory is that "all pointy-eared [[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoid]] species are either [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] or closely related to Sephi."<ref name="TT">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1395#16675997|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2007-06-08|time=6:48 AM|quote=For the longest time we've used dozens of pointy-eared characters without a species name for them. The pointed-eared species in the Jedi: Yoda comic were named Sephi. My theory is that all pointy-eared species are either Sephi or closely related to Sephi.}}</ref>
